songs.title: Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Star
songs.lyrics:
{Verse}
[C]Twinkle twinkle [F]little [C]star
[F]How I [C]wonder [G]what you [C]are
[C]Up a[F]bove the [C]world so [G]high
[C]Like a [F]diamond [G]in the [C]sky
[C]Twinkle twinkle [F]little [C]star
[F]How I [C]wonder [G]what you [C]are
songs.notes:
Lullaby standard — useful for warming up the right hand on piano (C major arpeggios) or for teaching kids basic chord changes on guitar.

Piano voicing: left-hand root-fifth, right-hand triads.
Guitar: open C, F, G — try Fmaj7 (xx3210) instead of full F if barre is rough.

songs.title: House of the Rising Sun
songs.lyrics:
{Intro}
[Am] [C] [D] [F] [Am] [C] [E] [E]

{Verse 1}
There [Am]is a [C]house in [D]New Or[F]leans
They [Am]call the [C]Rising [E]Sun
And it's [Am]been the [C]ruin of [D]many a poor [F]boy
And [Am]God I [E]know I'm [Am]one

{Verse 2}
My [Am]mother [C]was a [D]tail[F]or
She [Am]sewed my [C]new blue [E]jeans
My [Am]father [C]was a [D]gamblin' [F]man
Down in [Am]New [E]Or[Am]leans
songs.notes:
Classic 6/8 fingerpicking. Bass note → arpeggiate up.

My preferred voicings:
• Am: 002210 (standard)
• C: x32010
• D: xx0232 — leave the high E ringing
• F: xx3211 (don't bother with the full barre)
• E: 022100

Fingerpicking pattern: P-i-m-a-m-i (thumb walks the bass on beat 1 of each measure)

voicingNotes.F: xx3211 — skip the barre, easier transition from C.

songs.title: Amazing Grace
songs.lyrics:
{Verse 1}
A[G]mazing [G7]grace, how [C]sweet the [G]sound
That [G]saved a [Em]wretch like [D]me
I [G]once was [G7]lost, but [C]now am [G]found
Was [Em]blind but [D]now I [G]see

{Verse 2}
'Twas [G]grace that [G7]taught my [C]heart to [G]fear
And [G]grace my [Em]fears re[D]lieved
How [G]precious [G7]did that [C]grace ap[G]pear
The [Em]hour I [D]first be[G]lieved
songs.notes:
Beautiful for solo fingerstyle guitar in G with capo at fret 3 if you want the original key (Bb).

Piano: try doubled octaves in left hand under right-hand chords — slow tempo really helps the harmony bloom.

songs.title: Voicing Notes Demo
songs.notes:
Try clicking 'Cmaj7' above — the modal lets you save a custom guitar shape and a free-text voicing note that's specific to this song.

My go-to Cmaj7 on guitar: x32000 — leaves the open G ringing, gentle.
My go-to Cmaj7 on piano (RH): C-E-G-B (close voicing), or E-G-B-D (rootless, with C in the bass).

voicingNotes.Cmaj7: x32000 — open G ringing. RH piano: C-E-G-B.
